final_prompt.prompt:
Create an exploded-view technical illustration of a Sony A7 camera with all components labeled.

Style/medium: needs a technical diagram / exploded-view aesthetic — exact line weight and rendering style is yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout with all camera components separated and clearly labeled
Subject: must include all major camera components of a Sony A7:
  Body / chassis
  Image sensor
  Shutter mechanism
  Mirrorless mount (E-mount)
  LCD screen assembly
  EVF (electronic viewfinder)
  Main circuit board / processor
  Battery compartment
  Memory card slot
  Control dials and buttons
  Lens mount ring
  IBIS (in-body image stabilization) unit
  Heat sink / thermal management
  Connectivity ports (USB, HDMI, microphone, headphone)
Scene/backdrop: must be neutral technical background suitable for diagram clarity
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, technical illustration atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: needs a technical diagram direction — exact color scheme is yours
Materials/textures: needs a technical cutaway surface treatment — exact material rendering is yours
Text (verbatim): must include component labels in Spanish:
  "Cuerpo / Chasis"
  "Sensor de imagen"
  "Obturador"
  "Montura E"
  "Pantalla LCD"
  "Visor electrónico (EVF)"
  "Placa base / Procesador"
  "Compartimento de batería"
  "Ranura para tarjeta de memoria"
  "Dial de control / Botones"
  "Anillo de montura"
  "Estabilización de imagen (IBIS)"
  "Disipador de calor"
  "Puertos de conectividad"
Constraints: must preserve all component names in Spanish, exploded-view format must clearly separate all parts
Avoid:
